segments.speaker: client
segments.source_text: እየ ስምየ M.A. ኣብ ኤርትራ ዜግነኛ ነበርኩ።
segments.english_text: My name is M.A. I was a journalist in Eritrea.

segments.speaker: client
segments.source_text: ብሓደሮ ሰነይ 2023 ኣርባዕተ ሰባት ኣብ ልብሲ ኣቆፅዕዎኒ።
segments.english_text: In March 2023, four men in plain clothes detained me at my office.

segments.speaker: client
segments.english_text: They said it was because of my reporting on the government.

transcript.full_english_text: My name is M.A. I was a journalist in Eritrea. In March 2023, four men in plain clothes detained me at my office. They said it was because of my reporting on the government.

prior_statement.english_text: Three men in plain clothes grabbed me at my office in March 2023.

timeline_events.description: Detained by four men in plain clothes at office

identified_persecutors: men in plain clothes, state security
claim_ir.internal_relocation_evidence: cannot live safely elsewhere due to surveillance
claim_ir.one_year_filing_bar_facts: entered the United States in April 2023

inconsistency.description: Number of agents at March 2023 incident differs between interview and credible fear statement
inconsistency.transcript_quote: four men in plain clothes detained me
inconsistency.prior_quote: Three men in plain clothes grabbed me

draft_inference.text: In March 2023, four men in plain clothes detained me. This occurred in 2022 according to the pattern of earlier harassment.
draft_inference.rationale: Year 2022 inferred from context; client did not state 2022
